reasoning: Google faces fierce competition from OpenAI, Anthropic, and xAI for the #1 spot on the Chatbot Arena leaderboard. Historically, OpenAI has dominated the top position for the majority of the time, with Google and Anthropic taking #1 during less frequent and often brief intervals via incremental experimental releases. Furthermore, reports indicate that Gemini 2.0 and later models experienced "diminishing returns" and performance declines in some areas, suggesting Google has not been able to secure a definitive compute or architectural advantage. While Google frequently releases experimental models and could announce a new flagship towards the end of December 2025, they remain the underdog against OpenAI (which also tends to have late-year releases) and Anthropic. A 23% probability reflects Google's status as a major contender capable of top performance but lacking the historical dominance and momentum to be considered the favorite.
batch_queries: Will Google have the top AI model on December 31?
